violations.meaningZh: LiteralExpr 是“互斥选择”，三个字段只能出现一个
violations.message: The 'LiteralExpr::ExactlyOneLiteralKind' constraint is violated for 'org.eclipse.emf.ecore.impl.DynamicEObjectImpl/https://chaincollab/newTranslator/b2c#LiteralExpr@39b92232{file:/root/code/ChainCollab/src/newTranslator/MDAcheck/emf-random/b2c-100/b2c/model4/result4_200.xmi#/9/@actions.4/@expr}'

violations.meaningZh: 只允许 1 个起点；并要求 start event 显式 READY（与你示例/生成器取 start_event 的逻辑一致）
violations.message: The 'Contract::ExactlyOneStartFlow' constraint is violated for 'org.eclipse.emf.ecore.impl.DynamicEObjectImpl/https://chaincollab/newTranslator/b2c#Contract@6fdf59b7{file:/root/code/ChainCollab/src/newTranslator/MDAcheck/emf-random/b2c-100/b2c/model4/result4_200.xmi#/12}'

violations.meaningZh: 业务规则映射必须引用“本合约 globals”里的变量（避免跨 contract 串引用）
violations.message: The 'Contract::RuleMappingsReferenceOwnGlobals' constraint is violated for 'org.eclipse.emf.ecore.impl.DynamicEObjectImpl/https://chaincollab/newTranslator/b2c#Contract@6fdf59b7{file:/root/code/ChainCollab/src/newTranslator/MDAcheck/emf-random/b2c-100/b2c/model4/result4_200.xmi#/12}'

The 'Contract::SectionAtMostOnceEachKind' constraint is violated for 'org.eclipse.emf.ecore.impl.DynamicEObjectImpl/https://chaincollab/newTranslator/b2c#Contract@6fdf59b7{file:/root/code/ChainCollab/src/newTranslator/MDAcheck/emf-random/b2c-100/b2c/model4/result4_200.xmi#/12}'

The 'Contract::FlowSectionNotEmpty' constraint is violated for 'org.eclipse.emf.ecore.impl.DynamicEObjectImpl/https://chaincollab/newTranslator/b2c#Contract@6fdf59b7{file:/root/code/ChainCollab/src/newTranslator/MDAcheck/emf-random/b2c-100/b2c/model4/result4_200.xmi#/12}'

violations.meaningZh: READY 的事件只能有一个，并且必须等于 start flow 的 start event
violations.message: The 'Contract::ExactlyOneReadyEventAndMatchesStart' constraint is violated for 'org.eclipse.emf.ecore.impl.DynamicEObjectImpl/https://chaincollab/newTranslator/b2c#Contract@6fdf59b7{file:/root/code/ChainCollab/src/newTranslator/MDAcheck/emf-random/b2c-100/b2c/model4/result4_200.xmi#/12}'
